source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The switch S in Fig. 3.24 has been opened for a long time. At time $t=0$, S is closed. Calculate the current $I_{L}$ through the inductor as a function of the time.
extraction_notes: image fields contain PIL object representations rather than explicit file paths or URLs

issues: metadata.image_paths contains PIL object representations rather than explicit file paths or URLs

image_dependency: 题干显式引用“Fig. 3.24”，电路拓扑与元件参数应在图中给出
requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false，说明关键信息主要不在文字中
要求求电感电流随时间变化，若无电路图通常无法确定初值、终值和时间常数
multi_step: 需要先利用“opened for a long time”判断 t=0- 稳态初始条件，再分析 t=0 合闸后的暂态响应
答案是指数形式 I_L(t)，通常需组合电路识图、等效电阻/时间常数求解与边界条件确定
并非简单读图或单步代入；至少涉及初始值、最终值和指数项参数的联合确定
verifiability: answer_type=short_text，给出了明确的封闭形式表达式，可直接比对
答案包含数值系数与指数项 0.05(1-e^{-10^{7}t}) A，结果结构清晰
registry_passed=true，且图像存在、readability_score=0.8523，有利于后续基于图和公式的核验

candidate_problem_record.subject: 物理
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The switch S in Fig. 3.24 has been opened for a long time. At time $t=0$, S is closed. Calculate the current $I_{L}$ through the inductor as a function of the time.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。

extraction_notes: image fields contain PIL object representations rather than explicit file paths or URLs
metadata.reasoning_chain: Assume the inductor has negligible resistance. Then at $t=0$ and $t=\infty$, $I_{L}(0)=0$, $I_{L}(\infty)=\frac{10}{200}=0.05\ \text{A}$. The equivalent resistance as seen from the ends of $L$ is $R=200 \| 200=100\ \Omega$, giving the time constant as $\tau=\frac{L}{R}=\frac{10^{-5}}{100}=10^{-7}\ \text{s}$. At time $t$, the current passing through $L$ is $I_{L}(t)=I_{L}(\infty)+\left(I_{L}(0)-I_{L}(\infty)\right) e^{-\frac{1}{\tau}}=0.05\left(1-e^{-10^{7}t}\right) \ \text{A}$
